touches.ai_summary: Initial outreach via LinkedIn to Wyatt Rogers, Director of Sales at IvoryVentures. Introduced AskElephant as a solution for improving rep productivity. Wyatt responded positively and expressed interest in learning more.
next_steps: Send follow-up email with calendar link

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent to Wyatt with AskElephant overview focused on rep productivity use case. Wyatt replied confirming interest and availability for a discovery call next week.

questions_asked.question: How does AskElephant compare to Fireflies? We've been looking at them as well.
questions_asked.answer: Explained that AskElephant offers unlimited automation versus Fireflies' more limited feature set, with better integration for sales coaching and deal insights.

next_steps: Book discovery call for next Tuesday

touches.ai_summary: 23-minute discovery call with Wyatt Rogers. Discussed current pain points around sales rep efficiency and call documentation. Wyatt mentioned their team of ~12 reps struggles with manual note-taking and follow-up consistency. Confirmed they're evaluating Fireflies but haven't made a decision. Wyatt seems to own this evaluation but mentioned he'd need to loop in leadership eventually.

questions_asked.question: What's your current process for call documentation and follow-up?
questions_asked.answer: Manual notes in Salesforce, very inconsistent across reps. Takes 10-15 min per call.

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in this decision?
questions_asked.answer: Probably our VP of Sales eventually, but I can drive the initial evaluation and vendor selection.

questions_asked.question: What's the pricing structure for 12 seats?
questions_asked.answer: Provided initial pricing framework, mentioned we'd put together a formal proposal.

objections: Concerned about change management - reps are used to current process
next_steps: Send proposal with pricing for 12 seats

touches.ai_summary: 29-minute proposal review meeting with Wyatt. Walked through pricing at $9,400 ACV for 12 seats with unlimited automation tier. Wyatt asked for a discount to help get internal approval. Discussed implementation timeline and onboarding process. Wyatt mentioned he still needs to get final sign-off but feels confident he can push this through. No other stakeholders joined the call.

questions_asked.question: Is there any flexibility on pricing? This is slightly above what Fireflies quoted us.
questions_asked.answer: Offered a 22% discount to match their budget and competitive position, bringing ACV to $9,400.

questions_asked.question: When would you ideally want to have this rolled out?
questions_asked.answer: End of quarter would be ideal, gives us time to train reps before Q2 ramp.

questions_asked.question: What does onboarding look like for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: Explained 2-week onboarding with dedicated CSM, training sessions, and rep enablement materials.

next_steps: Wyatt to review with VP of Sales
Target contract signature by end of week

touches.ai_summary: 18-minute negotiation call with Wyatt. Reviewed revised contract terms with 22.4% discount. Wyatt confirmed the pricing works for his budget. Asked about payment terms and contract length flexibility. Mentioned he's planning to present to his VP tomorrow but feels good about getting approval. Still single-threaded through Wyatt with no direct executive engagement.

questions_asked.question: Can we do quarterly payments instead of annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: Confirmed we can accommodate quarterly billing at no additional cost.

questions_asked.question: Would it be helpful for me to join your conversation with the VP?
questions_asked.answer: Wyatt said he'd prefer to present internally first and loop us in if needed.

next_steps: Send final contract with quarterly payment terms
Wyatt to present to VP of Sales by end of week
